meaning: well meaning and kindly; serving a charitable purpose
example sentence: The benevolent gentleman donated a large sum of money to the local orphanage.

meaning: to combine two or more texts, ideas, or things into one
example sentence: She made the mistake of conflating the two separate issues into a single, unsolvable problem.

meaning: people in general or a group of people, often used informally to address a group
example sentence: It was nice to see all the folks at the family reunion yesterday.

meaning: the period of dim light in the evening during or after a snowfall
example sentence: The city streets looked peaceful and quiet during the snowy dusk.
